name: manim
description: Agent-ready Manim workbench for creating, rendering, and iterating on mathematical visualizations.

interface.longDescription: A complete agent workbench for Manim Community Edition: authoring guidance, MCP rendering, helper scripts, original examples, templates, and source survey notes for 3Blue1Brown-style mathematical visuals.
